benign: Mostly zero sanctioned exposure, with rare low-ratio accidental overlap.
Transaction counts cluster in established low-to-medium ranges, with some legitimate high-volume actors.
illicit: Sanctioned exposure ratios are materially higher, but still overlap benign outliers.
Accounts skew either freshly active or bursty, producing stronger account-newness and velocity signals.
Counterparty counts are broader and more spray-like.

note: Representative curated dataset for the Horizon Hackathon. Rows are deterministically synthesized from realistic, overlapping heuristics and are not production ground truth.
